series_metadata.series_title: SURFACE WATER FILES - AMBIENT STATIONS F
series_metadata.series_description: Includes physical, chemical and biological analysis data on river basins in district, comprehensive water quality data, fixed station monitoring program, water quality special projects and corvallis data.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain five years in operating area until incorporated into river basin reports, Comprehensive Water Qual- ity Reports (CWQR) and/or storage and retrieval (STORET), then des- troy., Paper: Wastepaper
